name: Rack Cell
explanation: A crisp 12-bit rack sampler in the Akai S900 / S1000 lineage. It plays a baked, self-authored CC0 sample - a bright mallet/marimba tone with a prominent tuned overtone and a sharp attack click, kept clean at 12-bit for the crisp Akai clarity - pitched across the keyboard with an amp envelope and a resonant low-pass. The Crunch control can re-crush the playback down to lo-fi grit when wanted. 6-voice poly. Controls: Tune, Cutoff, Decay, Crunch, Attack and Level.
